narrative_seed_by_week.9: System 1 vs System 2 thinking (Kahneman) — fast/instinctive vs slow/deliberate / Cognitive biases — confirmation bias, anchoring, automation bias / How human biases get encoded into AI training data / The Judgment Framework — three questions before acting on any AI output: / 1. What is the cost of this being wrong? / 2. Can I verify this without the AI? / 3. Who is accountable if this fails? / Acceptable error — defining the failure threshold that is tolerable for your use case / High-stakes domains where AI must not be the final word — medical, legal, safety

lab_activity_seed_by_week.9: Apply the Judgment Framework to your domain system — answer all three questions per component / Define acceptable error thresholds — what failure rate is tolerable and why? / Journal Entry #5
